title: Fabulous 3D
description: Clean redesigns of the vanilla Tools and Weapons.
body:
## **OVERVIEW**

This resource pack adds new tasteful 3D models for all the tools and weapons in the game. The **Fully 3D** version works fine from version 1.12.2 to 1.21.11.✅

## **UPDATES** 

> *CONSTANT REVISIONS AND TOUCH UPS WILL PERIODICALLY BE DONE FOR MOST OF THE MODELS*

> **Enchantment outlines coming soon!**

>✓ Now **Compatible** with the [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) mod!

>✓ Now **Compatible** with the [Locomotion](https://github.com/Trainguy9512/locomotion) mod!

>✓ Fully 3D compat for **1.12.2 - 1.21.11**
  
>✓ Handheld compat for **earlier versions** of the game (through [Modefite](https://modrinth.com/mod/modefite-item-definition-backport/versions)).

>❌ Redesigns of miscellaneous items, like the compass, clock, fishing rod, bow, crossbow.... etc..

#### *Join the discord to follow the pack's progress!*
[![Join](https://github.com/rareshield24/myimages/blob/main/discordicon.png?raw=true)](https://discord.gg/nwpw5P8W4n)

## **WHY THIS PACK?**
If you're like me and get tired of the vanilla tools and weapons textures, this resource pack is for you! The brand new, well-crafted models will make your gameplay more satisfying, giving you beautiful designs to admire as you play.

### **HOW TO USE**
Choose between the different versions of the pack and simply drag and drop into your resource packs.

# ENJOY!

<details>
  <summary>CONTACTS</summary>
